caption:
The library clock struck 2 AM, and the only sound was the hum of my own heartbeat 💓

Most people think professors just sit behind desks and grade papers, but in this city, the night belongs to secrets. I adjusted the silk tie at my collar, feeling the cool air of the lecture hall against my skin. Tonight was different. My star student, Julian, stayed late, claiming he needed help with the final thesis. The double doors shut behind us, locking out the rest of the campus. He leaned back in his chair, his eyes trailing the cut of my blazer. 'You're always so... intense, Dr. Vance.' I smiled, letting the fabric shift as I moved to the other side of the desk. 'And you're always so distracted by me, Julian.' The air thickened. My skirt hugged my hips perfectly, hiding the sway of my hips beneath the tailored material, yet every step echoed the rhythm of desire. He stood up, closing the distance between us. 'Maybe I want to distract you too.' His hand brushed my hip, sending a shiver down my spine that reached all the way to my toes. We didn't need to touch skin to feel the heat. A kiss promised, a secret kept, the kind of magic only a professor knows how to create.

#UniversityTeacher #LateNightStudy #ProfessorVibes #SecretDesires #Curves #InstaFit #NightOwl
